title: CCL - During  Call - Settings are locked
scenario: Close Conversation Limiting settings are locked and greyed out during an active call, showing a dialog that the setting cannot be adjusted
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Pair and connect a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Initiate or receive an active call on the connected device.
4. While on the active call, navigate to: Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Advanced.
5. Observe the Close Conversation Limiting (CCL) settings.
6. Tap on any CCL option (e.g., Off, Low, Medium, High).
expected: CCL settings should be adjustable during an active call, or if locked, the dialog should clearly explain why and allow the user to change the setting after acknowledging.
